---
title: "Owen Horton"
image: owen_picture.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: Resume
      icon: file-earmark-pdf
      href: Owen_Horton_Resume 2026.pdf
      target: _blank
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/owen-horton-lu11353/
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/owennhorton
      target: _blank 
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:owen.n.horton@lawrence.edu
---

Welcome! I'm Owen Horton, an aspiring data consultant pursuing a degree in Mathematics and Data Science with a minor in Geoscience at Lawrence University. I am a rising senior looking to secure a position in a company that will bring meaning to my career. Whether I utilize machine learning methods for marketing strategies within a large business, probabilistic analysis in customer assistance for a financial institution, or data-scientific journals to promote environmental conservation, I'm excited to contribute my skills with a team and help change the world. My professional links and sources are below, but there is much more I have to share about myself. I would be honored if you checked out my other pages of past projects, research, and hobbies!
